name: rails-claude-code-plugins
description: Ruby & Rails plugins for Claude Code — LSP servers, CLI tooling, and reactive UI patterns

plugins.name: ruby-lsp
plugins.description: Ruby LSP for Claude Code — code intelligence, diagnostics, and navigation for Ruby files

plugins.name: herb-lsp
plugins.description: Herb Language Server for Claude Code — ERB template intelligence, diagnostics, and navigation

plugins.name: rubocop-lsp
plugins.description: RuboCop LSP for Claude Code — Ruby linting diagnostics and auto-correction

plugins.name: stimulus-lsp
plugins.description: Stimulus LSP for Claude Code — Hotwire Stimulus controller intelligence for HTML and ERB

plugins.name: solargraph
plugins.description: Solargraph for Claude Code — Ruby code intelligence, completion, and documentation

plugins.name: charm-ruby
plugins.description: Build beautiful, interactive CLI tools in Ruby using the charm-ruby ecosystem (Bubble Tea, Lipgloss, Bubbles, Huh, and more)

plugins.name: reactive-rails-ui
plugins.description: Build smooth, reactive Rails UIs using Turbo Morphing, View Transitions, and Stimulus optimistic UI patterns
